channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Supreme Court Chief Justice Roberts issues warning on 'judicial independence' weeks before Trump inauguration
item.description: Supreme Court Chief Justice John Roberts said Tuesday officials from "across the political spectrum" have shown "open disregard for federal court rulings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he is planning to attend Jimmy Carter's funeral
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump said Tuesday that he's planning to attend the funeral of former President Jimmy Carter. Asked about it as he walked into a New Year's Eve party at his Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, Trump responded, "I'll be there.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chief Justice Roberts condemns elected officials for intimidating judges
item.description: Chief Justice John Roberts condemned elected officials who have intimidated judges and defied court rulings, highlighting them in his year-end report Tuesday as part of what Roberts called “illegitimate activity” that threatens the rule of law.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Top Republican demands 'costs' for China after it hacked Treasury Dept in year marked by CCP espionage
item.description: China was behind a 'major' hack of the Treasury Department, the Biden administration said Monday, gaining access to unclassified documents and the workstations of government employees.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: German chancellor takes veiled swipe at Elon Musk in New Year's address
item.description: Scholz's comments come days after the German government accused the billionaire of trying to influence its February election.
item.dc:creator: Steff Danielle Thomas, Fox 5

item.title: Imperial Beach mayor vying for San Diego County Supervisor
item.description: After San Diego County Board of Supervisors Chair Nora Vargas announced her decision to vacate her position at the end of her current term, three people have announced their desire to sit in her place.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Biden doesn't believe he should have dropped out of race: Source
item.description: President Joe Biden told aides privately that he believes he could have defeated Donald Trump had he remained in race
item.dc:creator: Kevin Bohn, NewsNation

item.title: DC mayor reports 'great meeting' with Trump after past public feuds, touts 'common ground' on nation's capital
item.description: Washington, D.C., Mayor Muriel Bowser said she met with President-elect Donald Trump to discuss their "shared priorities" for the nation's capital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Takeaways from AP's reporting on Sarah McBride, the first openly trans person elected to Congress
item.description: DOVER, Del. (AP) — Sarah McBride made history in Delaware as the first openly transgender state senator in the United States. Now she's making history again, recently elected as the first openly trans member of Congress.
item.dc:creator: TIFFANY STANLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How immigration and border security dominated 2024 and decided an election
item.description: Immigration and border security were two issues that dominated 2024 and help decide the November election as the border crisis loomed large over voters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Treasury says Chinese hackers remotely accessed workstations, documents in 'major' cyber incident
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Chinese hackers remotely accessed several U.S. Treasury Department workstations and unclassified documents after compromising a third-party software service provider, the agency said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A guide to funeral services for former President Jimmy Carter
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Funeral services honoring former President Jimmy Carter, who died Sunday at age 100, will be held in Georgia and Washington, D.C., beginning Saturday, Jan. 4, and concluding Thursday, Jan. 9. Here's a list of events, as provided by the Joint Task Force-National Capital Region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Learning Curve: The new players in Congress
item.description: Every two years, the period between November's election and when the new Congress begins is often the busiest swath of time for the media's coverage of Congress.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DNC chair candidate calls for greater investment in GOP states
item.description: In the four-point platform that was first seen by The Hill, Skoufis vowed to “dramatically” enhance the party’s Red State Fund if elected chair.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Jimmy Carter is being mourned in his tiny hometown and around the world
item.description: Tributes to former President Jimmy Carter are pouring in from his small hometown of Plains, Georgia, and around the world.
item.dc:creator: Russ Bynum, Sharon Johnson And Bill Barrow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: An appeals court upholds a $5 million award in a sexual abuse verdict against President-elect Trump
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal appeals court on Monday upheld a jury’s finding in a civil case that Donald Trump sexually abused a columnist in an upscale department store dressing room in the mid-1990s. The 2nd U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump gives complete and total endorsement of Johnson as Speaker
item.description: President-elect Trump offered his complete and total endorsement of Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Monday, days before a House vote on Friday to elect a new Speaker. "Speaker Mike Johnson is a good, hard working, religious man. He will do the right thing, and we will continue to WIN.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: How American presidents have planned their own funerals
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jimmy Carter's memorial journey will end at his house in the tiny town of Plains, Georgia, where he grew up on a peanut farm. That is where his wife, Rosalynn, was laid to rest last year in a burial plot that they chose years ago.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Carter is an example of ‘simple decency': Joe Biden
item.description: President Biden said former President Jimmy Carter, who died Sunday, “lived a life measured not by words but by deeds.
item.dc:creator: Brian Howard, NewsNation

item.title: California and national leaders honor former President Jimmy Carter after his passing
item.description: (FOX40.COM) — On Dec. 29, Jimmy Carter, the 39th president of the United States and a 2002 Nobel Peace Prize winner, died in his home in Plains, Georgia, according to the Carter Center. He was the longest-lived president at 100 years old.
item.dc:creator: Adoreil Ayoubgoulan, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk calls some MAGA supporters ‘contemptible fools’ as visa row intensifies
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk labeled a section of President-elect Trump supporters as “contemptible fools” as the online debate around visas for highly skilled workers on the right intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Vivian Moreno launches bid for Vargas' seat on Board of Supervisors
item.description: Days after San Diego County Board of Supervisors Chair Nora Vargas' surprise decision to leave her post at the end of her current term, the field for a potential special election to fill her seat has started to take shape.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
